arts.ttl: Two reasons why this could be Rodrygo’s best season at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Seven games in, Rodrygo has shown remarkable defensive commitment, which has been one of the standouts of Madrid’s season so far. With Mbappe not expected to track back, and Vinicius asked to focus more on attack, Rodrygo’s defensive presence has been vital.
